div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in the Netherlands (Emmet)
div.p: 11. The Department has instructed Am[erican] Embassy London to repeat to you long instruction in regard to visit of representatives of American rubber industry. They are going to The Hague first, arriving about March 9. They wish to talk with the responsible officials of the Netherlands Government. Please assist them in every appropriate way in accordance with Department’s cable to London.
Your 15, March 5, 5 p.m.Not printed. Department desires you to make whatever additional representations may seem useful in concert with efforts of Messrs. Viles and Blandin.
